title: Commercialising Knowledge Assets Fund: successful projects
body: "Commercialising Knowledge Assets Fund   The Commercialising Knowledge Assets Fund (CKAF) provides funding to government research organisations to commercialise public sector Knowledge Assets.    The CKAF supports an organisation to move viable public sector Knowledge Assets with identified potential markets towards commercialisation. It provides funding ranging from £50,000 to £250,000 per project.    CKAF was launched in May 2025 and has awarded 1.4 million to 6 projects from 4 organisations.    To find out more about CKAF and how to apply, visit our funding page.    You can also contact the funding team GOTTgrantfund@dsit.gov.uk.  "
